title: Museum Opening Night
occasion: Previewing the porcelain and print archives of the eastern ateliers
host_line: The Director and Trustees invite you to attend an exclusive opening night preview.
message: Be among the first to experience a guided unveiling of newly restored works, curator remarks, and a formal standing reception.
highlights: Champagne reception in the sculpture court
Private viewing access before public opening
footer_note: Invitation admits one guest unless otherwise confirmed.
